mapper.sql: id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_version, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_registry (gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_version, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolVersion}, #{toolDescription}, #{httpUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{httpHeaders}, #{timeout}, #{retryTimes}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

INSERT INTO mcp_protocol_registry
gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_version, tool_description, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time,
#{gatewayId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolType}, #{toolVersion}, #{toolDescription}, #{httpUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{httpHeaders}, #{timeout}, #{retryTimes}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_protocol_registry SET gateway_id = #{gatewayId}, tool_id = #{toolId}, tool_name = #{toolName}, tool_type = #{toolType}, tool_version = #{toolVersion}, tool_description = #{toolDescription}, http_url = #{httpUrl}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, http_headers = #{httpHeaders}, timeout = #{timeout}, retry_times = #{retryTimes}, status = #{status}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_protocol_registry ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, gateway_id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_type, tool_description, tool_version, http_url, http_method, http_headers, timeout, retry_times, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_protocol_registry WHERE gateway_id = #{gateway_id}
